name: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Unit consists of one share of common stock and a fraction of a warrant, offered together as a single unit during the company's initial public offering (IPO). The warrant gives the holder the right to purchase additional shares of the company's common stock at a specified price and time in the future. This is a common structure for SPAC IPOs, providing investors with potential upside from both the stock and the warrant.
